subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Since thou wert among those who strive in Our path, praise be to God thou art assuredly of those whom We guide unto Our ways [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طالب حقیقتا چون از زمره الذین جاهدوا فینا بودی الحمد لله از حزب لنهدینهم سبلنا
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @living waters; water of life, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
